name: Security Gate — Lambda
description: Pre-write security checks for Lambda Node.js functions

then.prompt: Before writing this file, check for: 1) Hardcoded secrets (API keys, tokens, AWS credentials, account IDs). 2) IAM policies with wildcard resources (Resource: '*'). 3) Synchronous Lambda invocations (invoke another Lambda directly instead of SQS/EventBridge). 4) console.log usage (must use Lambda Powertools logger). 5) Missing input validation (handler without Zod schema). 6) Timeout misuse (900s for API-triggered functions). If issues found, DENY the write and explain what needs to be fixed.
